constraints: Reveal rooms, corridors, and connections through exploration
Do not reveal undiscovered secrets automatically

recovered_state.rule: Re-verify reconstructed details before final requirements

open_questions: Connectivity model: offline, online, or hybrid
Participation model: solo, local multi-user, asynchronous multi-user, or real-time multiplayer
Target platform order for MVP and post-MVP
Exact level size and expected session length
Stack and technical architecture after product scope is mature

readiness.reason: High-weight Product Discovery decisions and recovery verification remain incomplete

next_action.instruction: Ask exactly one A/B/C decision card identifying the primary target-player strategy, persist the accepted answer, update the handoff, then continue with the next highest-weight unresolved question.
